title: [circt-bmc] Crash with `--print-solver-output`
body:
This appears to be due to the wrong signature for `printf` generated by `lib/Tools/circt-bmc/LowerToBMC.cpp` (`(ptr, ...) -> void` instead of `(ptr, ...) -> i32`).

Backtrace:

```
file.mlir:1:1: error: redefinition of function 'printf' of different type '!llvm.func<i32 (ptr, ...)>' is prohibited
module {
^
circt-bmc: /home/$USER/repos/github/llvm/circt/lib/Conversion/SMTToZ3LLVM/LowerSMTToZ3LLVM.cpp:155: mlir::LLVM::CallOp {anonymous}::SMTLoweringPattern<OpTy>::buildCall(mlir::OpBuilder&, mlir::Location, llvm::StringRef, mlir::LLVM::LLVMFunctionType, mlir::ValueRange) const [with OpTy = circt::smt::CheckOp]: Assertion `succeeded(funcOpResult) && "expected to lookup or create printf"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: circt-bmc --shared-libs /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz3.so.4 --print-solver-output --module ex file.mlir -b 1
 #0 0x000064b034d68df0 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (/home/$USER/repos/github/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-bmc+0x193edf0)
 #1 0x000064b034d6627f llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (/home/$USER/repos/github/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-bmc+0x193c27f)
 #2 0x000064b034d663ca SignalHandler(int, siginfo_t*, void*) Signals.cpp:0:0
 #3 0x0000793448442520 (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x42520)
 #4 0x00007934484969fc __pthread_kill_implementation ./nptl/pthread_kill.c:44:76
 #5 0x00007934484969fc __pthread_kill_internal ./nptl/pthread_kill.c:78:10
 #6 0x00007934484969fc pthread_kill ./nptl/pthread_kill.c:89:10
 #7 0x0000793448442476 gsignal ./signal/../sysdeps/posix/raise.c:27:6
 #8 0x00007934484287f3 abort ./stdlib/abort.c:81:7
 #9 0x000079344842871b _nl_load_domain ./intl/loadmsgcat.c:1177:9
#10 0x0000793448439e96 (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x39e96)
#11 0x000064b035639692 (anonymous namespace)::SMTLoweringPattern<circt::smt::CheckOp>::buildCall(mlir::OpBuilder&, mlir::Location, llvm::StringRef, mlir::LLVM::LLVMFunctionType, mlir::ValueRange) const LowerSMTToZ3LLVM.cpp:0:0
#12 0x000064b0356303e1 (anonymous namespace)::CheckOpLowering::matchAndRewrite(circt::smt::CheckOp, circt::smt::CheckOpAdaptor, mlir::ConversionPatternRewriter&) const LowerSMTToZ3LLVM.cpp:0:0
#13 0x000064b0356a3f40 mlir::OpConversionPattern<circt::smt::CheckOp>::matchAndRewrite(circt::smt::CheckOp, circt::smt::CheckOpGenericAdaptor<llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::ValueRange>>, mlir::ConversionPatternRewriter&) const LowerSMTToZ3LLVM.cpp:0:0
#14 0x000064b0356a3c90 mlir::OpConversionPattern<circt::smt::CheckOp>::matchAndRewrite(mlir::Operation*, llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::ValueRange>, mlir::ConversionPatternRewriter&) const LowerSMTToZ3LLVM.cpp:0:0
#15 0x000064b0374e33cc mlir::ConversionPattern::matchAndRewrite(mlir::Operation*, mlir::PatternRewriter&) const (/home/$USER/repos/github/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-bmc+0x40b93cc)
#16 0x000064b037514208 mlir::PatternApplicator::matchAndRewrite(mlir::Operation*, mlir::PatternRewriter&, llvm::function_ref<bool (mlir::Pattern const&)>, llvm::function_ref<void (mlir::Pattern const&)>, llvm::function_ref<llvm::LogicalResult (mlir::Pattern const&)>) (/home/$USER/repos/github/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-bmc+0x40ea208)
#17 0x000064b0374e5cfc (anonymous namespace)::OperationLegalizer::legalize(mlir::Operation*, mlir::ConversionPatternRewriter&) DialectConversion.cpp:0:0
#18 0x000064b0374e627c mlir::OperationConverter::convert(mlir::ConversionPatternRewriter&, mlir::Operation*) (/home/$USER/repos/github/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-bmc+0x40bc27c)
#19 0x000064b0374e9a4c mlir::OperationConverter::convertOperations(llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::Operation*>) (/home/$USER/repos/github/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-bmc+0x40bfa4c)
#20 0x000064b0374eb109 mlir::applyFullConversion(mlir::Operation*, mlir::ConversionTarget const&, mlir::FrozenRewritePatternSet const&, mlir::ConversionConfig) (/home/$USER/repos/github/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-bmc+0x40c1109)
#21 0x000064b03563369f (anonymous namespace)::LowerSMTToZ3LLVMPass::runOnOperation() LowerSMTToZ3LLVM.cpp:0:0

#26 0x000064b034cbf3a3 main (/home/$USER/repos/github/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-bmc+0x18953a3)
#27 0x0000793448429d90 __libc_start_call_main ./csu/../sysdeps/nptl/libc_start_call_main.h:58:16
#28 0x0000793448429e40 call_init ./csu/../csu/libc-start.c:128:20
#29 0x0000793448429e40 __libc_start_main ./csu/../csu/libc-start.c:379:5
#30 0x000064b034cb8c65 _start (/home/$USER/repos/github/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-bmc+0x188ec65)
fish: Process 164480, 'circt-bmc' from job 1, 'circt-bmc --shared-libs /lib/x8…' terminated by signal SIGABRT (Abort)
```
